title: quercus robur var. paleacea
intro: Quercus robur var. paleacea, also known as the English pale oak, is a variety of the Pedunculate oak tree (Quercus robur) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus robur var. paleacea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Quercus robur var. paleacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
